name: save_status_update
description: Create or update a project/initiative status update. Omit `id` to create, provide `id` to update.

id.description: Status update ID - if provided, updates this existing update

body.description: Content as Markdown. Do not escape the string — use literal newlines and special characters, not escape sequences. To mention a user, use @displayName (e.g., @johndoe)

isDiffHidden.description: Deprecated. Hide diff with previous update (create only)
